name: 繼兄妹禁忌戀
description: 父母再婚導致相愛的兩人被迫成為繼兄妹，倫理禁忌與真實情感的衝突產生極大戲劇張力。觀眾既心疼又期待他們打破桎梏。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: We're going to be step siblings, aren't we? / Andrea and I would never be siblings. / As long as they don't register their marriage, we are free. Don't leave me behind again.
examples.context: 父母再婚導致相愛的兩人被迫成為繼兄妹，倫理禁忌與真實情感的衝突產生極大戲劇張力。觀眾既心疼又期待他們打破桎梏。
